patch.value: Combine GH-241 (pm-7snq stats field-utilization), GH-242 (pm-hntj field-existence filters), GH-236 (pm-mfl1 governance missing-field filters). Shared primitive in core/governance. Philosophy: project management = context management — make under-contextualized items queryable.

author: claude-code-agent

value.title: Core primitives: content-field presence + governance-missing predicates + utilization

message: plan create initial step "Core primitives: content-field presence + governance-missing predicates + utilization"

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Core primitives done. metadata-coverage.ts NEW exports: isReviewerMissing/isRiskMissing/isConfidenceMissing/isSprintMissing/isReleaseMissing; MissingMetadataFilters extended with reviewerMissing/riskMissing/confidenceMissing/sprintMissing/releaseMissing; hasMissingMetadataFilter + itemMatchesMissingMetadata (per-flag AND, governance fields added to metadataMissing union); CoverageItem gained reviewer/risk/confidence(string|number)/sprint/release. content-fields.ts exports verbatim per spec: ContentField, CONTENT_FIELD_ORDER, ContentFieldItem, isContentFieldPresent, ContentFieldSelection, ContentFieldFilters, hasContentFieldFilter, itemMatchesContentFilters, filterByContentFields, contentFiltersNeedCollections, contentFiltersNeedBody, ContentFieldUtilization, ContentFieldUtilizationReport, computeContentFieldUtilization. DEVIATIONS: (1) confidence typed string|number because ItemMetadata.confidence is ConfidenceValue=number|string and pure-string broke consumer assignability in stats.ts; isConfidenceMissing treats a finite number as present. (2) vitest.config include is already a literal src-glob so content-fields.ts is auto coverage-gated; no edit needed. (3) Did NOT fix tests/unit/commands/metadata-governance-commands.spec.ts:79 (outside my scope) which now FAILS as an intended consequence of widening the metadataMissing union to governance fields; the command-layer sub-agent must reconcile that expectation. typecheck green; the two governance specs pass (48 tests).

patch.value: All 3 child features shipped (pm-7snq/pm-hntj/pm-mfl1) in one PR. Plan type excluded from changelog.
